name: Tostada Beef Casserole
recipeInstructions:
1. Brown the meat.
2. Add 1-1/2 cups tomato sauce and the seasoning mix to the browned meat.
3. Line the bottom of a 12 X 7-1/2 inch pan with 2 cups of crushed taco chips.
4. Spoon the meat mixture over the chips.
5. Add the remaining tomato sauce over the meat mixture.
6. Bake at 375°F for 25 minutes.
7. Sprinkle cheese on top and add 1/2 cup of crushed taco chips.
8. Return to the oven for another 3 minutes.
9. Serves 6.
